subcodes.first_line: O My servants! The ocean of bounty and mercy and forgiveness hath been and shall ever be in waves, and the grace of the True One, exalted be His glory, encompasseth all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عباد بحر کرم و رحمت و غفران در امواج بوده و خواهد بود و فضل حق جل جلاله جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations
